disclaimer: Educational assessment. CARSI is an IICRC-approved CEC provider; this is CARSI-original Australian training, not IICRC certification.
note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Mould Remediation Practitioner — Knowledge Check

options: Normal fungal ecology for that indoor environment
Settled spores from a nearby Condition 3 area

questions.questionText: When mould is present, air movers should be…
options: Withheld until clearance — use air-filtration devices and dehumidifiers only

questions.questionText: The purpose of containment with negative pressure and HEPA filtration is to…
options: Prevent cross-contamination of clean areas by spores
The area has returned to Condition 1 and is visibly and verifiably clean
Be the same for every job
Escalate with the Condition and the scale of contamination

questions.questionText: Remediation must always be paired with…
options: Fixing the moisture source, or the mould returns
